description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named validate-p4c that runs daily at midnight UTC and on pull requests to the main branch. The workflow has a single job that validates P4C compilation of P4-16 programs in parallel with normal tests, but only for pull requests labeled with 'run-validation'. The job uses an ubuntu-20.04 environment, checks out the repository with submodules, sets up ccache, builds the project, and runs validation tests with ctest.
